TC-S5-016-01.description: Drag document from Personal Data folder onto Certificates folder, verify document moved

TC-S5-016-02.description: Document displayed at case root level (no folder), verify visible in tree

TC-S5-016-03.description: Drag root-level document into Personal Data folder, verify document moved into folder

TC-S5-016-04.description: During drag, hover over folder, verify folder shows drag-over styling (border highlight)

TC-S5-016-05.description: Drop document into folder, verify success toast "Document moved to Personal Data"

TC-S5-016-06.description: Attempt to drop document onto another document, verify drop not allowed

TC-S5-016-07.description: Drag document and drop on same folder, verify no action (no redundant move)

TC-S5-016-08.description: Move document via drag-drop, verify document registry updated with new folderId

TC-S5-016-09.description: Move document, refresh page, verify document persists in new folder location

TC-S5-016-10.description: Drag cursor changes to grabbing during drag operation

TC-S5-016-11.description: Cancel drag (drag out of window), verify document remains in original folder

TC-S5-016-12.description: Move document, click it, verify DocumentViewer displays correct document

TC-S5-016-13.description: Drag multiple documents sequentially, verify each moves correctly

TC-S5-016-14.description: Upload document to root (folderId=null), verify appears outside folders in tree
